title: Various lint fixes
body:
… found by manually running `golangci-lint`. See the individual commit messages for details.

WARNING: Completely untested.

Note that this does not actually add `golangci-lint` to the CI pipeline. Is there a standard set of linters used throughout the containers/* ecosystem? (@cevich do you happen to know?)

comments.body: No standard set AFAIK.  Though generally we use a beefier VM or container to run golangci-lint as it tends to be quite memory hungry.  Worse, it OOMs without any error or notice :confused:
